channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped, 14th March
item.description:
Stuff

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashenden Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Bag, 14th March

Of rubbish Street also not clean

item.title: Blocked drain, 14th March
item.description:
The drain in the street is completely blocked
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cuff Crescent, Eltham

item.title: 10 inch potholes I have to fill in to get to mine, 14th March
item.description:
It’s not a private road my car and all the resistance cars are starting to get damaged. Can you please jump on it as not a big job for a company to sort out with the right machinery

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Lane, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silverdale Road, Barnehurst, Greater London

item.title: Flytip, 14th March

Station Passage Please clear flytip of doors and a fridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Passage, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: 2 Christmas trees have been dumped on the pavement across the road from where they were reported before (FixMyStreet ref: 9061615), 14th March
item.description:
The trees are in the way of people walking on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67-68, Enid Street, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Large Pot on the Speed Bump, 14th March
item.description:
Large pot hole on the edge of the speed bump on the road. Please arrange to inspect and repair. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 14th March

There is an abandoned vehicle which has moved for several months. Also it doesn’t have a valid Mot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thorndon Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.title: Large Pot Hole beside Drainage Gutter, 14th March
item.description:
Large pot hole by the drainage gutter which is located close to the traffic lights going towards the fish roundabout. Please arrange to inspect and repair. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New graffiti on Lenses Abbey walkover, 14th March
item.description:
This is fresh. Would've been done between Friday night and Saturday afternoon.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Road, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Road surface breaking up right across the road, 14th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: Approx. 56Godstow Road: long green cushion in gutter., 14th March
item.description:
Possible cushion from a garden chair. Looks as though it’s been in the gutter for some time.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Water leak, 14th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodcombe Crescent, Forest Hill, Greater London

item.title: Disintegrating road surface, 14th March
item.description:
Large pothole near number 1 Blackbrook Lane and disintegrating road surface as far as number 9
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Diesel is leaking into river / pond at this location a strong smell of diesel is coming from water, 14th March
item.description:
Diesel is in the waterway caused by upstream pollution of waterway, very strong smell of diesel at this location and visible in water
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite Holland & Barrett, southbound side of road, No.242 Kentish Town Road, 14th March
item.description:
Failed road repair. The repair has subsided over time and the surface is visibly cracked and broken. Each time a heavy vehicle — particularly buses — crosses the defect it produces a sharp impact causing ground-borne vibration sufficient to shake doors and windows in the adjacent residential building where we live. The defect has been present for approximately three months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 230-234, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hraffiti, 14th March
item.description:
19-24 Romans Way. Remove graffiti from bin chamber area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Culmore Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 14th March
item.description:
13-18 Roman Way. Remove graffiti from bin chamber

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Culmore Road, Peckham, Greater London
